title: Soul Soil Craft
description: Small but useful datapack, allows to create soul soil.
body:
**This datapack lets you craft Soul Soil using Soul Sand.**

Soul Speed is a great enchantment for fast travel, especially when paired with Soul Soil. However, while Soul Soil is _technically_ renewable, obtaining it in large quantities is often slow and resource-intensive.

This datapack changes that by allowing you to craft Soul Soil easily, quickly, and in bulk.

**Here’s the crafting recipe:**
![Recepie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f79f1c0f85b3bcabef0f6c876592f13c343b2fc.png)

If you encounter any problems, please write in discord j_mastepro
